sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91091" key="ptakismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτακ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91091.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shyness, timidity</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1128</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
